case_title: MARCUS ALRIDGE VS. THE POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA,

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MARCUS ALDRIDGE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY THOMAS HUGHES. CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-28-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE PARTIES AGREED TO A SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT TO 1) PAY $1,437.44 TO PLAINTIFF 2) WAIVE ALL BALANCE DUE UNDER THE AUTO LOAN IN DISPUTE, AND 3) SUBMIT A REQUEST TO CREDIT BUREAU(S) TO REMOVE NEGATIVE REMARKS FROM PLAINTIFF'S CREDIT REPORT(S). PLAINTIFF MARCUS ALRIDGE APPEARED. DEFENDANT THE POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY THOMAS HUGHES, AVP RISK MANAGEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ALRIDGE, MARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT THE  POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORPORATION DBA THE POLICE CREDIT UNION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00);[LISTED AGENT FOR SERVICE EDDIE YOUNG] DOCUMENT STAMPED 'BY FAX' SERVED SEP-21-2023, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THE  POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORPORATION DBA THE POLICE CREDIT UNION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE  POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORPORATION DBA THE POLICE CREDIT UNION
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY ALRIDGE, MARCUS THE  POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORPORATION DBA THE POLICE CREDIT UNION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE  POLICE CREDIT UNION OF CALIFORNIA, A NONPROFIT CORPORATION DBA THE POLICE CREDIT UNION
